Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If Rejected Do NOT finalize documentation before closing Not Allowed Skipping steps changing order finalizing documentation after rejection closing case without following decision logic Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Credit Check within 24h of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Follow up Call before Close Case encouraged not required Violations are not serious just suboptimal Event Log Case 1 Follows exact sequence Approved All steps present Timestamps look tight Case 2 Application Received Risk Assessment before Credit Check Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation after rejection Close Case Missing Inform Applicant Case 3 Application Received 2 days later Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved 2 days later Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case No Follow up Call Timestamps show delays greater than 24h and greater than 48h

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 Sequence App Rec Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Doc Close Case Matches normative sequence exactly Timestamps All within same day Jan 10 Credit check within 24h Yes 30 mins Inform within 48h of decision Yes 2 hours Follow up call Not present but it is a desideratum Normative Compliant Desiderata Compliant with timing Missing follow up call desideratum violation but minor

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 Sequence App Rec Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Violations Risk Assessment occurs before Credit Check Violates ordering rule Missing Inform Applicant step entirely Violates sequence skipping rule Finalize Documentation occurs after a Rejected decision Explicitly forbidden

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Justification Interpretation Could be a system error manual override by an inexperienced worker or a rushed process where steps were logged out of order The documentation finalization after rejection might be a clerical mistake or preparing rejection letters mislabeled as finalization Missing Inform Applicant could mean notification was sent but not logged or genuinely skipped

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 Sequence App Rec Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Sequence is correct No skipped steps Decision logic followed Approved Finalize Doc Close Compliant Desiderata Violations Credit Check timestamp Jan 12 09 00 to Jan 14 10 00 about 49 hours greater than 24h recommendation Inform Applicant timestamp Jan 14 12 00 to Jan 16 15 00 about 51 hours greater than 48h recommendation No Follow up Call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Justification Interpretation Delays could be due to weekends holidays staffing shortages high volume or manual review bottlenecks Missing follow up call is common when process is straightforward or automated notifications suffice

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check Case 2 again Missing Inform Applicant The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So skipping it is a normative violation Check Case 3 timestamps Jan 12 09 00 to Jan 14 10 00 is indeed greater than 24h calendar time Desiderata for Case 1 Missing follow up call I should note it as a minor desideratum deviation Make sure to explicitly separate normative vs desiderata violations per case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Provide interpretations that are realistic in business process contexts system glitches manual errors weekend delays logging issues Structure Response Follow the 3 tasks explicitly Use clear headings bullet points For each case address normative desiderata and justifications Ensure tone matches process mining compliance analysis

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Note during drafting Check Jan 12 2024 day of week Jan 14 2024 is a Sunday The log shows activity on Jan 14 Sunday So maybe not strictly weekend I will just say non business hours backlog or manual review delays to be safe

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against constraints All match Language is precise Distinguishes strict vs soft rules clearly Provides realistic business process justifications Ready Output matches response Self Correction Verification during thought Check Case 2 Inform Applicant is completely missing The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So it is a skip Check Case 3 timing Jan 12 09 00 to Jan 14 10 00 equals 49 hours Jan 14 12 00 to Jan 16 15 00 equals 51 hours Both exceed recommendations Correct Desiderata clarification I will explicitly state that these are soft constraints and represent efficiency quality opportunities rather than compliance failures
